properties.description: Allow all inbound traffic from RFC 1918 private address space. Covers hub (10.0.0.0/16), workload spoke (10.1.0.0/16), and DMZ spoke (10.2.0.0/16).
Allow Azure Load Balancer health probe traffic. Required for any internal load balancer fronting shared services.
Block all inbound traffic originating from the internet. Shared services subnet is internal-only; any internet-facing access must go through the hub firewall or Bastion.
Explicit catch-all deny for all remaining inbound traffic. Placed before the implicit Azure default deny to make intent visible in the audit trail.
Allow outbound traffic to all RFC 1918 internal ranges. Shared services must be able to reach spokes and hub resources for management, DNS, and monitoring.
Allow outbound to Azure platform service tags for storage, monitoring, and management plane access.

Block direct internet egress from the shared services subnet. All internet-bound traffic must be routed through Azure Firewall via the UDR on this subnet. This NSG rule provides defense-in-depth on top of the UDR.
